trigger_evaluation.reason: Exact-date, airline-specific round-trip fares for 2026-10-19 to 2026-10-30 could not be reliably verified from accessible public booking pages during this run. No threshold claim was inferred from nearby-date or monthly fares.

verified_observations.source: Official Turkish Airlines Istanbul-Baku fare page
verified_observations.observation: October 2026 round-trip fares on nearby dates were shown from approximately TRY 15,550-15,588, but the requested 19-30 October combination was not displayed.
Route-level October 2026 examples showed round-trip fares from about TRY 11,078 on other dates; requested exact dates were not exposed in the accessible result.
Route-level examples showed round-trip fares from about TRY 13,048 on other October dates; requested exact dates were not exposed in the accessible result.

Route-level examples showed round-trip fares from about TRY 12,690 on other October dates. Exact requested dates were not exposed in the accessible result; AZAL public fare pages also note that baggage or optional services may add fees depending on fare.

notes: No exact-date fare, flight-time, flight-number, or baggage detail was fabricated.
